EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - TA requirements candidate
EmailTemplate.subject: Travel & Accomodation Preferences
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
TRAVEL & ACCOMMODATION PREFERENCES.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
To proceed with your application, we need to know a bit more about your travel plans to and from site, what accommodation you may require and if you'll be travelling with company. Please head to the portal and fill out the travel and accommodation preference form.
OPEN THE PORTAL
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
